stim-pack.name: Stim Pack
stim-pack.examineText: A military-grade auto-injector filled with nanite solution. The label reads: ATLAS MEDICAL CORP.
stim-pack.useText: You press the injector against your arm. A rush of warmth spreads through your body as the nanites get to work.

energy-bar.name: Energy Bar
energy-bar.description: Compressed nutrition. Tastes like cardboard, works like fuel.
energy-bar.useText: You chew through the dense bar. It tastes like sawdust and vitamins.

rad-away.name: Rad-Away
rad-away.description: Rare anti-radiation medicine. Flushes accumulated radiation.
rad-away.useText: The bitter liquid burns going down, but you can feel the {green:radiation fading} from your cells.

scrap-metal.name: Scrap Metal
scrap-metal.description: Bent and rusted metal fragments. Can be shaped into tools.

bio-sample.name: Bio Sample
bio-sample.description: Organic tissue in a sealed vial. Useful for BIO analysis.

data-chip.name: Data Chip
data-chip.description: Small storage device. May contain useful information.
data-chip.examineText: The chip is labeled: PROJ. ATLAS — PHASE 3. The data is encrypted.

cryo-keycard.name: Cryo Keycard
cryo-keycard.description: Access card for cryo facility doors.
cryo-keycard.examineText: A magnetic keycard. The name field reads: Dr. ████████. The rest is corrupted.

signal-tuner.name: Signal Tuner
signal-tuner.description: Boosts your neural implant's signal reception.
signal-tuner.examineText: A small device that amplifies specific radio frequencies. It's tuned to the same frequency as... the signal.

pipe-wrench.name: Pipe Wrench
pipe-wrench.description: Heavy wrench. Doubles as a weapon.

emp-grenade.name: EMP Grenade
emp-grenade.description: Electromagnetic pulse device. Devastating to electronics.
emp-grenade.useText: The EMP grenade detonates with a sharp {cyan:crack}. All electronics in the area shudder.

makeshift-armor.name: Makeshift Armor
makeshift-armor.description: Scrap metal plates strapped together. Better than nothing.

med-kit.name: Med Kit
med-kit.description: Cobbled-together medical supplies. Restores significant health.
med-kit.useText: You carefully apply the bandages and antiseptic. {green:Much better.}

flashlight.name: Flashlight
flashlight.description: Battery-powered light. Reveals hidden areas in dark zones.

ghost-protocol.name: Ghost Protocol
ghost-protocol.description: A combat subroutine buried in your implant firmware. Use to auto-pass one combat skill check.
ghost-protocol.examineText: Pre-Collapse military firmware. Someone loaded this into your implant before cryo. The question is who — and why.
ghost-protocol.useText: The subroutine fires. Your body moves before your mind catches up — a perfect strike, executed from muscle memory you never earned.

corrupted-chip.name: Corrupted Chip
corrupted-chip.description: A data chip that wasn't there a moment ago. Reveals hidden details when used at a terminal.
corrupted-chip.examineText: The data on this chip shifts every time you look at it. Like it's not stored — it's being generated. By what?
